body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-6826", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "Concrete CMS 9.5.0 and below  is vulnerable to unauthenticated file usage disclosure via missing permission check in the usage controller.  Any unauthenticated visitor can request /ccm/system/dialogs/file/usage/{fID} with any file ID and receive a list of every page that references that file, including page IDs, handles, and full URLs. This includes pages that are otherwise restricted by permissions. Concrete CMS thanks Eldudareeno for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0025, "percentile": 0.16037}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4g7q-44qp-cc5c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T22:57:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g7q-44qp-cc5c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4g7q-44qp-cc5c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-6826"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T21:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:30:37Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6826", "https://documentation.concretecms.org/9-x/developers/introduction/version-history/951-release-notes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g7q-44qp-cc5c"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/concretecms/concretecms", "summary": "Concrete CMS is vulnerable to unauthenticated file usage disclosure", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T22:57:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g7q-44qp-cc5c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.5.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "concrete5/concrete5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 9.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Concrete CMS is vulnerable to unauthenticated file usage disclosure
